case_number: Crl. Bail Application No. D-07 of 2025

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Crl. Bail Application No. D-07 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on MA No.974/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on MA No.975/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 19.05.2025 Mr. Muzaffar Ali Laghari, Advocate for applicant/accused along with applicant Allah Jurio. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. It is contended by the counsel for the applicant that the applicant is driver of official vehicle/police mobile and posted at PS Sindhri at the time of commission of alleged offence. Initially, three FIRs have been registered, but the name of the applicant is not mentioned in the said FIRs however, now the matter has been transferred to F.I.A, in view of alleged custodial death, and the FIA is causing harassment and questioning the liberty of the applicant. The learned counsel further contended that since trial Court /ATC, Mirpurkhas has issued non-bailable warrant of the applicant/accused, it is difficult for him to approach the trial Court for seeking concession of pre- arrest bail. Without touching merits of the case, the applicant namely Allah Jurio s/o Hussain Bux is granted protective bail in crime No.21/2024 under sections 201, 364, 302, 34, 147, 148, 149, 120-B, 337-A(vi) PPC and Section 6/7 ATA 1997, 8 & 9 of Torture and Custodial Death Prevention 2 and Punishment Act, 2022, PS FIA Composite Circle, Mirpurkhas for a period of 07 days, enabling him to surrender before the trial court, commencing from today subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs. 30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned Additional Registrar of this Court.

The learned counsel further contended that since trial Court /ATC, Mirpurkhas has issued non-bailable warrant of the applicant/accused, it is difficult for him to approach the trial Court for seeking concession of pre- arrest bail. Without touching merits of the case, the applicant namely Allah Jurio s/o Hussain Bux is granted protective bail in crime No.21/2024 under sections 201, 364, 302, 34, 147, 148, 149, 120-B, 337-A(vi) PPC and Section 6/7 ATA 1997, 8 & 9 of Torture and Custodial Death Prevention 2 and Punishment Act, 2022, PS FIA Composite Circle, Mirpurkhas for a period of 07 days, enabling him to surrender before the trial court, commencing from today subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs. 30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of the aforesaid period or on an early date on which the applicant surrenders himself before the Court concerned, whichever is earlier. It is made clear that in case applicant/accused fails to appear before the trial court, the surety so furnished by him shall be forfeited without notice. The protective bail application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Adnan Ashraf Nizamani*
